recurring_credits.name: Annual Hotel Credit (Chase Travel℠)
recurring_credits.description: $50 annual hotel credit on hotels booked through Chase Travel portal.

_review_reason: Card has 1-year complimentary DashPass ($120 value) — but it's PROMOTIONAL ONE-YEAR not recurring — excluded. Need to verify whether DashPass is actually renewed yearly with cardmembership (in which case it IS recurring) or just first-year freebie (excluded). Per current Chase marketing 'complimentary DashPass for at least 12 months when activated by 12/31/2027' suggests promotional. Also verify $50 hotel credit terms (anniversary vs calendar year) — Chase's wording varies.
_excluded: DoorDash monthly credits — terms unclear from search, may require activation/eligibility
